name: Theality TV
overview: Hosted by iconic journalist Michael Musto, Theality TV is a brand-new reality show about an Off-Broadway musical’s efforts to see the light of day. Financier gives Rob $10,000 and one month to get his musical Little House on the Ferry off the ground in a one-night-only backers edition. The Musical tells the story of a love triangle set in Fire Island weekend marriage equality passes in New York - starring Gay WWE muscular, wrestler Fred Rosser (Darren Young).
